SourceString: Welcome back to Lumina {PlayerName}. The shade is trying to snuff out every lantern again.
Start by checking the field outside the village. Even a small anomaly matters now.
The lantern is lit again. Adventurer, you are steadier than I expected.
The footprints keep returning to the same place. Follow the markers and we may find the cause.
The path is open. The mist left a gap and the trail continues through it.
Even the wind is careful inside the forest. Do not follow the sound from the left for too long.
That is a rift shard. From here on do not walk past black light without looking closer.
The pattern on the stone has awakened. A night the guardian could not speak of still remains.
Memories do not disappear. They wait until someone recognizes the heart left behind.
The guardian light is flowing left. The Mist Lord's nest is close.
The shade has gathered. When broken light blocks the path, the Mist Lord appears at its end.
If the road is closed then I will open it first.
Lumina's shade has fallen back. But the rift did not begin with the guardian.
Today's steps are the beginning of the next light. I will meet you under the next shade, adventurer.
This memory does not feel like a road walked for the first time. The Moonshadow Realm is calling you again.
I will hold the front. If the path is blocked I only need to open it first.
I can see the flow of the rift. Read the rule and magic can make a road.
The wind moved first. Follow the trace and you can arrive before the answer does.
This is a road moonlight cannot reach. If your shadow walks ahead of you, do not follow it.
The reflecting lantern is lit again. This road was not a sealed door but an invitation someone left behind.
The corridor has turned above and below around. The record collapsed, but its order remains.
Final entry record confirmed. The Silver Lantern Society watched the rift for a long time instead of closing it.
Here, sight arrives before sound. Break the observation lens and even silence should make a path.
The observatory's silence has lifted. Even within the Apostles of Moonshadow, not everyone believes the same answer.
I remember these stairs. I have never seen this place, but my feet know it first.
The rebirth memory and the real place overlap. Adventurer, you were not only outside this incident.
A returned memory seeks the door again. The door does not answer. The door endures.
If the door endures, then this time I will push through to the end.
The first seal is open. The abyssal dark has not vanished; it has only stepped back.
The flow of Dark is dense here. Even if moonlight purification slows, stay calm and read the rift's grain.
The rift crystal is stable. Even the Abyss has rules. If rules exist, they can be severed.
Every nameplate in this room is blank. Even erased names cannot erase the choices left behind.
My source name remains unconfirmed. But the record purpose is intact. I will guide you to the next door.
There is a black guardian stone. It has the same structure as Lumina's stone, but the light flows the other way.
The sanctuary's light did not go out. Even in darkness, rules remain that can be held.
The gate is moving like a heart. If you hear a name, do not answer it. Look forward only.
The memory shard recognized you. Now the shadow throne waits beyond the door.
You have walked far. If you wish to recover even the words you forgot, come this way. Again, this way.
I will choose which memories I reclaim. Opening a door does not mean I will follow you.
Only the lord's shadow has fallen. The true body still holds the door deep within the Abyss.
Even so, today's door is closed. In the next rebirth, this memory will take you farther.
This is the backlit approach. The light looks like it comes from behind us, but the true coordinates are pushing forward.
The inverted lantern is stable. Here, moonlight is closer to a force that sets direction than one that simply shines.
The ash repeats a sentence. Even if a failed record is burned, the heat left behind revives the same words.
The hidden record is confirmed. The Silver Lantern Society did not erase its guilt; it tried to keep the record from being read again.
The frost bridge is bending the light. These coordinates fold in the same direction as the scene you saw during rebirth.
Diffraction coordinates match. Your memory is not outside the Abyss mechanism.
That tower is tuning the rift rather than closing it. Someone lent a hand to Verkas's sentence.
The tuning tower's lightning has stopped. Even among the Apostles of Moonshadow, not everyone looks at the same moon.
The side that shines decides the door. Light that enters cannot leave. Darkness that leaves does not return.
If direction decides the door, then this time I will change the direction.
The middle seal road is open. The backlight has not broken; it has only lost its direction for a moment.
Moonlight is flowing upward from below. Rebirth memory can be strength, but it can also become fuel for the Abyss.
The reverse-flow layer is calm. Repetition is not only a road that leaves strength behind; it also leaves responsibility.
A vow is appearing without sound. Some in the Society could not close the rift, so they fixed it in place with a promise.
The silent vow has lifted. A promise can hold a door, but it cannot erase guilt.
The record signal is unstable. In this sector, trust what you see directly over my report.
The blank lens has stopped. A scene that was never recorded still truly happened.
Abyss sentences overlap here. Someone is trying to turn your memory into the sentence of a vow.
The sentence depth is open. Asterion's throne is holding the final line.
Read. Repeat. Vow. The door does not close. The door waits for direction.
I will not read along. If a sentence decides the road, then I will rewrite its end.
Asterion's sentence has turned over. Today's door did not close, but the backlight aimed at the present world has bent away.
Verkas's true body is beyond a deeper door. Even so, now we can see where the door is facing.
This is beneath the door Asterion overturned. From here no light reaches, so trust only the recorded coordinates as you descend.
The first layer of the descent is stable. The lord's true body is not as far as a shadow. It already breathes beneath us.
Quenched lanterns stand in rows. The first rift the Silver Lantern Society could not close was left behind as these graves.
The trace of the first rift is confirmed. A guilt that failed to stop the beginning can only be repaid at the end.
Memory has settled and hardened. Verkas never stopped your rebirth; he only gathered that repetition as fuel.
The sediment has scattered. Even memory turned to fuel is still yours. Take back what you thought was stolen.
The echoes of a fallen sanctuary linger. The Apostles of Moonshadow hid their last stigma here.
The last stigma is recovered. The light the apostles left is not to defeat the lord, but to keep you from losing your way.
The lord does not speak directly. I relay his voice in his place. Turn back; this echo is the final warning.
If you only relay the voice, then I will cut it off in your place. I will go and speak to the lord myself.
The reverberation road has fallen quiet. The herald is down, but the lord's voice still rings from somewhere deeper.
The crystal depths are cold. The closer to the true body, the more memory freezes; do not forget what you came here to protect.
You have passed the depths. Even within frozen memory, you did not let go of what you meant to protect.
A torn dimension is sutured shut with darkness. My records end here. Please write the rest yourself.
You have crossed the suture. A recorder may never see the end, yet records to the very end. Please, show me that end.
The thunderpeal barrier marks the last boundary. Cross it and record and reality will no longer be divided.
The barrier has split open. I am a record persona, yet this one boundary I will cross together with you.
This is the throne antechamber. As an Apostle of Moonshadow, I give my final warning: defeating the lord will not erase the root of the rift.
If you would go even so, I will not stop you. This choice alone belongs to you, not to an apostle.
At last you have come yourself, not a shadow. Every one of your rebirths was a road leading to this throne.
It was not you who set the road. I am the one who walked it here. Let me show you that difference now.
The Abyss Throne has fallen. The dimension the lord's true body held now returns to its place at last.
The root rift still remains. Yet today you reached its end by your own will, not the lord's.
